name: slidesmentor
description: Turn a research paper into teaching artifacts and a stronger NotebookLM slide prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Turn papers into teachable slide artifacts
interface.longDescription: Extract a teaching story from a paper, generate lecture-facing artifacts, and produce a stronger NotebookLM presentation prompt.
defaultPrompt: Teach this paper and make a NotebookLM prompt.
Turn this paper into a slide outline for grad students.
Review this paper's code and build a lecture story.
